content.en:
Ye Tian took out the Taishang Divine Blood, swallowed it in one gulp, and then urged the Taihao Infinite Body to slowly refine it.

Rumble!!!

The energy of the Taishang Divine Blood was integrated into Ye Tian's Taihao Infinite Body, quickly refining his Taihao Infinite Body, allowing the Taihao Infinite Body to increase at an extremely terrifying speed.

"It's too terrifying, after my Taihao Immeasurable Body reaches the Dacheng realm, even Hailou Tianjin is of no use. However, this Taishang Divine Blood can quickly improve my Taihao Immeasurable Body!"

Ye Tian felt that this Taishang Divine Blood could really help him break the shackles and raise the Taihao Immeasurable Body to the realm of perfection.

As time passed, this part of the Taishang Divine Blood was slowly consumed, and his Taihao Immeasurable Body was gradually approaching the limit of Dacheng.

At the same time, Ye Tian also took out other resources, all the resources that could help improve Taihao's immeasurable body, he took them out to refine, to ensure that he could really break through.

After a long time, Ye Tian's Taihao Infinite Body finally ushered in a breakthrough.

"Finally a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

At this moment, his Taihao Immeasurable Body reached the consummation realm, and his strength instantly increased many times, and his strength far surpassed his previous self.

With his current strength, he can already completely crush those top-notch fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, which is enough to rival the weaker fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

Of course.

That kind of weaker fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform does not necessarily exist, and the strength of a normal fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform is still above him.

But he at least has the qualifications to fight, unlike before, he didn't even have the qualifications to fight.

"It's time to go to the sea of glazed light!"

Ye Tian took out a bead, and this bead was able to allow him to enter the sea of glazed light.

Airplanes!

The beads urged, and Ye Tian's body instantly passed through the Infinite Realm Ruins and came to the Sea of Glazed Light.

......

In an infinite void, dense clusters of light formed a sea of light.

And Ye Tian was in a cluster of light.

"This is the sea of glazed light!"

Ye Tian knew that this was Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor's territory, so he didn't dare to mess around.

He also sensed the aura of several Great Ancestors, but he didn't bother them, and directly began to cultivate.

For him, this was an opportunity to greatly improve his cultivation.

He couldn't practice here forever, he only had 10 million realms to spend the first year.

Beyond that time, he will be expelled.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to cultivate, absorbing the energy of the light cluster to specialize in the whole body refinement.

For him, only by completing the whole body tempering can he greatly improve his strength.

Moreover, if you want to become a high-level immeasurable lifeform of the fifth stage, you must complete more than nine times of full-body tempering, which is an essential process!

The immeasurable blood combined with the energy of the glazed light sea is very good when refined, maybe it is not as good as the effect of using the immeasurable blood spiritual liquid, but here it is better than the energy, and he still has 10 million years of cultivation in the first year of the realm.

Time passed, and finally in the first year of the 30,000th Realm, Ye Tian finally completed the third full-body tempering.

But from the third full-body tempering to the fourth full-body tempering, it took a little longer.

This time, Ye Tian spent more than a million years of the first year of the realm to complete the fourth full-body refinement.

"It seems that you can only complete the fifth full-body tempering in the Glazed Light Sea!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But even so, he was satisfied.

If it was an ordinary fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, it might be able to complete nine full-body refinements with the help of this.

But he was different, his physical body was too powerful, far surpassing other fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, so the difficulty of his completing a full-body refinement was naturally not comparable to other Great Ancestors.

Therefore, it was already an unimaginable opportunity for him to use this place to complete the fifth full-body tempering, saving countless resources and time.

this day.

Ye Tian had completed the fifth full-body refinement, and the time of the first year of the 10 million realm was approaching.

Ye Tian only stabilized the realm, and was directly moved out by the sea of glazed light, and the bead also disappeared, which meant that he would not be able to enter here again.

Five times of full body tempering, Taihao has no measure of perfection, and in terms of cultivation, Ye Tian can't make any progress in a short period of time.

Even if he had refined the immeasurable blood spirit liquid of the Evil Blue Land, it would be impossible for him to complete the sixth full-body refinement.

"Next, let's focus on the inheritance of immeasurable supernatural powers!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he was also ready to refine the Escape Shuttle, which could help him shuttle into the Infinite Realm Ruins, and even return to the Silent Black Sea at any time.

The Escape Shuttle is relatively difficult to refine, especially for a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform like Ye Tian, it is very difficult to refine.

However, it still took Ye Tian a long time to refine it successfully.

"Let's try it!"

Ye Tian urged the Escape Shuttle, and his body entered the inside of the Escape Shuttle.

The next moment, the Escape Shuttle broke through the barrier of the Xuanqi Territory and escaped into the immeasurable ruins.

But soon, he escaped from the ruins of the Immeasurable Realm again.

Then, using the Escape Shuttle, he easily came to the Truncated Boundary of the Silent Black Sea.

"Very good, with this Escape Shuttle, it will be very easy to enter the Infinite Realm Ruins or return to the Silent Black Sea!"

Ye Tian put away the Escape Shuttle, and in the following years, he began to study the technique of immeasurable supernatural powers.

And the first research of the immeasurable magic technique is the immeasurable magic power of the defense class of the immeasurable magic art.

When he completely accepted the inheritance of this magical power, he was stunned.

"No wonder the inheritance of an immeasurable supernatural skill is so cheap, it turns out that it is very difficult to practice!"

Ye Tian learned from the inheritance that it was very difficult to give birth to the immeasurable magic technique of the Infinite Feather Armor when he broke through the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

In order to successfully intervene in the Infinite Divine Power Technique in the fourth stage of the high-level Immeasurable Life Form Realm, one must have enough understanding of the Immeasurable Divine Power Technique, and intervene in the depths of the Immeasurable Bone to form the seed mark of the Divine Power Technique.

After the seed imprint is formed, it intervenes little by little in the way recorded in this lineage, and finally forms the immeasurable feather armor seed imprint.

After this imprint is completely formed, once it breaks through to the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable life form realm, the imprint of the immeasurable supernatural power will become a true immeasurable supernatural technique.

Under normal circumstances, a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform would probably be able to intervene to form the seed imprints of the three immeasurable supernatural powers, but the immeasurable bone was incomparably powerful in the fourth stage, and it would probably be able to form the seed imprints of several more immeasurable supernatural powers.

However, successful interventions are not something that can be done casually.

Just like the Infinite Feather Armor, the Infinite Divine Power Technique, not only needs to control the power of the Infinite Divine Power Technique Seed Imprint to the limit, but also needs some materials.

And the value of these materials far exceeds the value of inheritance, and even ordinary fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms can hardly gather these materials.

"If I want to train the Infinite Feather Armor Seed Mark, I have to gather these materials!"

Ye Tian thought about it and felt that he still had to find resources, otherwise he would waste these immeasurable magical power inheritances in vain!

Moreover, if he wants to become more powerful, this top-notch immeasurable magic technique naturally has to be learned!
